---
title: "The Rev. Charles Marriott"
---

## The Rev. Charles Marriott

**Dates:** (1811-1858)

### Description

Vicar of St. Mary’s Oxford

### Biography

A prominent Tractarian, pupil of the Rt. Rev. George Moberly, a celibate,  brother of the Rev. John Marriott, Vicar of St. John’s Hythe. [ODNB; according to Moor, <i>Erminois</i>]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
